faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Bay Ridge typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Bay Ridge residents before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why are mice so common in Bay Ridge buildings?
faqs.answer: Bay Ridge has many older buildings with gaps in foundations, aging infrastructure, and shared walls between units that create easy access for mice. The neighborhood's restaurant scene along Third and Fifth Avenues also provides food sources, while proximity to the waterfront and parks gives mice natural harborage areas nearby.
